feed.title: Pronounce ‚Äî recent dictionary additions
feed.subtitle: How engineers actually pronounce project / product / jargon names. Community-maintained.

entry.title: Quarkus ‚Äî quar kus
entry.summary: Quarkus is pronounced "quar kus" (/Ààkw…ëÀêrk…ôs/). "QUAR-kus".

entry.title: Micronaut ‚Äî my kro nawt
entry.summary: Micronaut is pronounced "my kro nawt" (/Ààma…™kro än…îÀêt/). "MY-kro-nawt".

entry.title: GraalVM ‚Äî grahl V M
entry.summary: GraalVM is pronounced "grahl V M" (/Àà…°r…ëÀêl viÀê …õm/). "GRAHL-V-M".

entry.title: JVM ‚Äî J V M
entry.summary: JVM is pronounced "J V M" (/Àåd íe…™ viÀê Àà…õm/). "J-V-M".

entry.title: Blazor ‚Äî blay zer
entry.summary: Blazor is pronounced "blay zer" (/Ààble…™z…ôr/). "BLAY-zer".

entry.title: MAUI ‚Äî maw ee
entry.summary: MAUI is pronounced "maw ee" (/Ààma äi/). ".NET MAW-ee".

entry.title: WinUI ‚Äî win U I
entry.summary: WinUI is pronounced "win U I" (/Àåw…™n juÀê Ààa…™/). "WIN-U-I".

entry.title: React ‚Äî ree akt
entry.summary: React is pronounced "ree akt" (/riÀà√¶kt/). "ree-AKT".

entry.title: Angular ‚Äî ang you lar
entry.summary: Angular is pronounced "ang you lar" (/Àà√¶≈ã…°j…ôl…ôr/). "ANG-yuh-ler".

entry.title: Ember ‚Äî em ber
entry.summary: Ember is pronounced "em ber" (/Àà…õmb…ôr/). "EM-ber".

entry.title: Marko ‚Äî mar ko
entry.summary: Marko is pronounced "mar ko" (/Ààm…ëÀêrko ä/). "MAR-koh".

entry.title: Axum ‚Äî ax um
entry.summary: Axum is pronounced "ax um" (/Àà√¶ks…ôm/). "AX-um".

entry.title: Actix ‚Äî ak tix
entry.summary: Actix is pronounced "ak tix" (/Àà√¶kt…™ks/). "AK-tix".

entry.title: Tokio ‚Äî to kyo
entry.summary: Tokio is pronounced "to kyo" (/Ààto äkjo ä/). "TOH-kyo" ‚Äî like the city.

entry.title: Tonic ‚Äî ton ik
entry.summary: Tonic is pronounced "ton ik" (/Ààt…ín…™k/). "TON-ik" ‚Äî Rust gRPC.

entry.title: Hyper ‚Äî hy per
entry.summary: Hyper is pronounced "hy per" (/Ààha…™p…ôr/). "HY-per" ‚Äî Rust HTTP.

entry.title: Diesel ‚Äî dee zul
entry.summary: Diesel is pronounced "dee zul" (/ÀàdiÀêz…ôl/). "DEE-zul" ‚Äî Rust ORM.

entry.title: SeaORM ‚Äî C O R M
entry.summary: SeaORM is pronounced "C O R M" (/ÀàsiÀê …îÀêrm/). "SEA-orm".

entry.title: Leptos ‚Äî lep toss
entry.summary: Leptos is pronounced "lep toss" (/Ààl…õpt…ís/). "LEP-toss" ‚Äî Rust web framework.

entry.title: Dioxus ‚Äî die ox us
entry.summary: Dioxus is pronounced "die ox us" (/da…™Àà…íks…ôs/). "die-OX-us".

entry.title: Quartz ‚Äî quartz
entry.summary: Quartz is pronounced "quartz" (/kw…îÀêrts/). "quartz" ‚Äî static site gen for digital gardens.

entry.title: Eleventy ‚Äî e lev en tee
entry.summary: Eleventy is pronounced "e lev en tee" (/…™Ààl…õv…ônti/). "e-LEV-en-tee" ‚Äî aka 11ty.

entry.title: Jekyll ‚Äî jek ul
entry.summary: Jekyll is pronounced "jek ul" (/Ààd í…õk…ôl/). "JEK-ul".

entry.title: Gatsby ‚Äî gats bee
entry.summary: Gatsby is pronounced "gats bee" (/Àà…°√¶tsbi/). "GATS-bee".

entry.title: Pelican ‚Äî pel i kun
entry.summary: Pelican is pronounced "pel i kun" (/Ààp…õl…™k…ôn/). "PEL-i-kun".
